description: Top-level orchestrator that ensures Ollama is installed and reachable, the default model is present, optional CLIs are surveyed, and config / policy files exist. It is a thin coordinator over `Install-SlashOpsOllama`, `Install-SlashOpsModel`, and config defaults — never auto-runs destructive steps.
notes: Keep this thin; the heavy lifting lives in `set-02`/`set-03`/`set-05`.
steps: TDD: Skips Ollama install when reachable.
TDD: Calls `Install-SlashOpsModel` (mocked) when default model missing.
TDD: Refuses to proceed with `SLASHOPS_NONINTERACTIVE = 1` and missing `-AcceptDefaults`.
TDD: Returns a structured result with per-step status.
Author `Public/Install-SlashOpsRuntime.ps1` calling sub-installers in order, surfacing errors.
name: [set-01] Install-SlashOpsRuntime orchestrator
